---
title: "Nancy (Nanxi) Lu"
subtitle: "Master's Student at The Bartlett Centre for Advanced Spatial Analysis, UCL"
image: images/profile_pic.jpg
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 15em
  image-shape: rounded
---

```{r load_packages, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(fontawesome)
```

::: {#hero-heading}
::: {.hero-terminal}
`nanxi@casa:~$` `portfolio --open`

<span class="hero-code-line">urban_planning + spatial_data + evidence_led_design</span>
:::

Hello! Welcome to my portfolio page.

I am an <span class="code-accent">urban planning</span> and <span class="code-accent">spatial data</span> student interested in city regeneration, transport planning, urban spatial analysis and evidence-led design.

[<i class="bi bi-github" style="font-size: 1.5rem;"></i>](https://github.com/Nanxi-lu) [<i class="bi bi-envelope" style="font-size: 1.5rem;"></i>](mailto:nanxi.lu.25@ucl.ac.uk)

[About](about.qmd){.about-links .subtitle} [Coursework](coursework.qmd){.about-links .subtitle} [CV](cv.qmd){.about-links .subtitle}
:::

## Selected Work

::: {.project-grid}
::: {.project-card}
### Gambling Exposure in London

Spatial analysis of bookmaker distribution across London neighbourhoods, linking gambling exposure with housing pressure, economic inactivity and neighbourhood vulnerability.

[View project](qm-gambling.qmd)
:::

::: {.project-card}
### Chicago Crime Prediction

Spatio-temporal analysis of Chicago crime incidents from 2022 to 2024, combining hotspot mapping, temporal decomposition, ARIMA/SARIMA and Random Forest forecasting.

[View project](stdm-chicago-crime.qmd)
:::

::: {.project-card}
### London Road Casualty Risk

Spatial data science project analysing road casualty risk across London MSOAs, using spatial autocorrelation, LISA clusters, OLS and Random Forest modelling.

[View project](dsss-road-casualty.qmd)
:::
:::

## Research Interests

- Urban spatial analysis and neighbourhood inequality
- Transport planning, mobility and accessibility
- GIS, spatial statistics and data visualisation
- Urban regeneration and evidence-led planning

[View references and project sources](references.qmd)
